scripts.qa:frontend: npm --prefix frontend run lint && npm --prefix frontend run build
scripts.qa:docker:smoke: docker compose up -d --build && sleep 8 && curl -fsS http://localhost:4000/api/health >/dev/null && curl -fsS http://localhost:8080 >/dev/null && docker compose down -v
scripts.qa:all: npm run qa:backend && npm run qa:frontend && npm run qa:docker:smoke
